subject: Meeting notes: Platform Architecture Review
messageText:
Meeting notes: Platform Architecture Review
Date: May 14, 2026
Time: 10:00 AM - 11:00 AM
Platform: Google Meet

Attendees:
- Shubham Gaur (shubham.gaur@onixnet.com) - Lead Engineer
- Matteo Vaiente (matteo.vaiente@onixnet.com) - Engineering Manager
- Priya Sharma (priya.sharma@onixnet.com) - DevOps Engineer

Summary:
The team reviewed the current platform architecture and discussed migrating the data pipeline from a monolithic ETL to a modular dbt-based approach. Key bottlenecks in the current Talend setup were identified. Agreement was reached on the migration timeline.

Topics Discussed:
- Current Talend ETL performance bottlenecks
- dbt migration strategy and timeline
- CI/CD pipeline improvements for data workflows
- Team capacity planning for Q3

Decisions:
- Migrate to dbt by end of Q2 2026
- Adopt GitHub Actions for CI/CD on all data pipelines
- Shubham will lead the migration; Priya will handle infrastructure

Action Items:
1. Shubham Gaur: Create detailed migration plan for Talend-to-dbt by 2026-05-20
2. Priya Sharma: Set up GitHub Actions pipeline template by 2026-05-21
3. Matteo Vaiente: Schedule stakeholder sign-off meeting by 2026-05-17
4. Shubham Gaur: Audit existing Talend jobs and classify by complexity by 2026-05-22

Next Steps:
Follow-up review scheduled for May 21, 2026.
